data.title: Paxos Gains Approval to Become Regulated National Trust
data.description: According to Odaily, Paxos has announced that the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has approved its transition to a regulated national trust institution. This change will place all of Paxos' operations in the United States under the supervision of the OCC. The company will provide support to businesses at various stages of digital asset development and ensure service and compliance across all 50 states.

data.title: The U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency has approved Paxos as a regulated blockchain infrastructure provider.
data.description: According to official sources, Paxos has announced that the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has approved it as a regulated blockchain infrastructure provider and will transform it into a regulated national trust institution. All of its business activities in the United States will be regulated by the OCC, including supporting businesses at all stages of digital asset development and providing services and compliance assurance in all 50 states. It is understood that the OCC had previously conditionally approved trust banking licenses for Ripple, BitGo, Digital Assets, and Circle.

data.title: Significant SOL Transfer to Fireblocks Custody
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 23:56, a total of 22,300 SOL was transferred from an anonymous address beginning with 8ZozA to Fireblocks Custody.

data.title: BitGo Receives Conditional Approval to Become a National Trust Bank
data.description: According to Odaily, cryptocurrency custodian BitGo announced on Friday that it has received conditional approval from the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to transition into a banking institution. Upon final approval, BitGo plans to convert its South Dakota-registered trust company into a federally chartered national trust bank. This transformation will enable BitGo to custody digital assets and certain non-deposit financial assets, and offer regulated cryptocurrency-related services without requiring state-by-state approval. The company anticipates receiving final approval soon.

data.title: Ripple National Trust Bank Receives Conditional Approval from OCC
data.description: According to Odaily, market sources indicate that the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has conditionally approved the application of Ripple National Trust Bank.

data.title: BitGo Receives Regulatory Approval to Transform into a Banking Institution
data.description: Cryptocurrency custodian BitGo announced on Friday that it has received conditional approval from the U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to transform into a banking institution. Once final approval is granted, BitGo will convert its South Dakota-registered trust company into a federally chartered national trust bank, enabling it to custody digital assets and certain non-deposit-taking financial assets, and offer regulated cryptocurrency-related services, without requiring state-by-state approval. The company stated it expects to receive final approval soon. (WSJ)

data.title: The U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency has conditionally approved Ripple National Trust Bank's application.
data.description: According to market sources, the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) has conditionally approved Ripple National Trust Bank's application.

data.title: Broadcom Stock Falls As AI Sales Outlook Dissappoints Investors
data.description:
Broadcom stock falls over 10% after its sales outlook for the red-hot market failed to meet investors’ lofty expectations.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/equities/broadcom-stock-falls-as-ai-sales-outlook-dissappoints-investors/

data.title: Hackers Exploit ZEROBASE Protocol Frontend, Resulting in Significant Losses
data.description: According to TechFlow, on December 12, hackers successfully infiltrated the frontend of the ZEROBASE protocol, leading to the theft of funds from over 270 users. The total losses exceeded $240,000, with one user alone losing as much as 123,597 USDT. Prior to the incident, ZEROBASE had issued a security warning about phishing contracts on the BNB Chain, which were attempting to impersonate the official ZEROBASE interface and hijack user connections to trick them into granting USDT authorization.

data.title: Crypto Investor Faces Significant Losses Amid Liquidation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Huang Licheng, known as 'Machi Big Brother,' has experienced another liquidation involving 6,489 ETH, resulting in a loss of $720,000. Currently, Huang holds a long position with only 2,500 ETH, valued at $7.79 million, with the latest liquidation price set at $3,074.62, incurring an unrealized loss of $314,000.

Huang's account now has a remaining balance of $340,000, having suffered a loss of $2.44 million over the past week.

data.title: Significant SOL Transfer from Hyperunit to Wintermute
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham reveals that at 23:48, a total of 18,243.9999947 SOL was transferred from Hyperunit to Wintermute. The transaction is valued at approximately $2.46 million.

data.title: ZEROBASE hackers have stolen funds from over 270 users, with one user losing over 123,000 USDT.
data.description: According to Lookonchain's monitoring, the ZEROBASE front-end was hacked. Analysis revealed that the hackers stole funds from more than 270 users, totaling over $240,000. One user lost as much as 123,597 USDT.

data.title: Hyperliquid plans to introduce a portfolio margin mechanism.
data.description: Hyperliquid announced on its Telegram channel that it plans to add a portfolio margin feature in an upcoming network upgrade. This feature is already live in the pre-alpha version of the testnet. Under portfolio margin mode, users' spot and recurring trades are combined, thereby improving capital efficiency.

data.title: Europe reconsiders crypto oversight as ESMA centralization gains momentum
data.description:
As MiCA enters its implementation phase, uneven enforcement across the EU is reigniting debate over whether crypto supervision should move from national regulators to ESMA.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/europe-crypto-oversight-esma-centralization-podcast?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Strategy's Cash Reserve Strategy Amid Bitcoin Price Fluctuations
data.description: According to Odaily, BitMine Chairman Tom Lee has analyzed Strategy's recent establishment of a $1.4 billion cash reserve. Despite a more than 50% drop in Strategy's stock price over the past six months, this reserve will enable the company to continue paying dividends to shareholders without selling its $61 billion Bitcoin holdings. Lee noted that during the previous Bitcoin downturn, Strategy's stock traded below its net asset value (NAV), and the cash reserve is a preparation for similar circumstances.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 90,000 USDT with a Narrowed 0.10% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 12, 2025, 15:58 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 90,000 USDT and is now trading at 89,926 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.10% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Standard Chartered Bank: Expects average gold price of $4,488/ounce in 2026.
data.description: Standard Chartered Bank predicts that gold prices will reach new highs in 2026, with an average price of $4,488 per ounce in 2026 and an average price of $4,750 per ounce in the fourth quarter of 2026. (Golden10)

data.title: Tom Lee: Strategy's $1.4 billion cash reserve could prevent forced selling during BTC price drops.
data.description: BitMine Chairman Tom Lee analyzed that Strategy's recent accumulation of $1.4 billion in cash reserves is quite remarkable. Despite Strategy's stock price falling by more than 50% in the past six months, this cash reserve will allow the company to continue paying shareholder dividends during the Bitcoin price decline without selling its $61 billion Bitcoin holdings. Lee pointed out that during the last Bitcoin downturn, Strategy's stock traded below its net asset value (NAV), and building this cash reserve is precisely to prepare for that situation. (Decrypt)

data.title: Machi Brother suffered another liquidation of 6,489 ETH and a loss of $720,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, Machi Dage has had 6,489 ETH liquidated again, resulting in a loss of $720,000. He currently has only 2,500 ETH in long positions ($7.79 million) remaining. The latest liquidation price is $3,074.62, with a floating loss of $314,000.
